execution:
Direct via Shopify Admin MCP (graphql_mutation articleUpdate) — appended a `

Related reading

    ...
` section to each of 9 articles in the size cluster on the mattress-buying-guide blog. Closes out the size-cluster internal-link graph in a single PR (vs the 3 batches needed for the pain cluster, because these articles are much smaller — under 11KB each, totaling ~65KB vs the pain cluster's ~280KB).
cms_hygiene: Same pattern as pain-cluster batches (PRs #215/#216/#217): fetched all 9 canonical bodies in one graphql_query, generated new bodies locally by appending the Related reading section (preserving every word of merchant-authored content), then articleUpdate via MCP per article. updatedAt timestamp confirmed after each call, zero userErrors across all 9 mutations.

articles_updated.role: pillar — links DOWN to all 4 'what-is-size' articles + 2 comparison articles
comparison — short queen vs standard queen (RV/camper niche)

seo_impact: Size cluster is now a fully-connected internal-link graph. The how-to-choose-the-best-mattress-size pillar anchors the cluster with 6 outbound links; each size-specific 'what-is-X' article links back to the pillar plus 2-4 sibling sizes/comparisons. Queen-vs-king (the highest-traffic comparison article in the cluster) acts as a secondary hub linking to all 4 of: pillar, queen detail, king detail, king-vs-Cal-King. 34 new internal links total across 9 articles.

comparison_to_pain_cluster.rationale: Size cluster articles are significantly shorter (under 11KB each vs 11-48KB for pain articles), so all 9 fit comfortably in a single MCP session without context overhead concerns.

next_options: Material cluster — what-is-memory-foam, what-is-hybrid, what-is-latex, what-is-innerspring, memory-foam-vs-hybrid, hybrid-vs-innerspring (~6-8 articles).

Reverse links to the 3 new LA pillar articles (best-mattress-los-angeles, mattress-store-near-me-los-angeles, mattress-financing-options-los-angeles) from older popular articles. Flagged out-of-scope in Phase 297.
